output.$starlark: [s / sum(output) for s in output] if sum(output) > 0 else [1.0 / len(output) for s in output]

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

description: Ranks cat pictures by expressive character — how vividly each image communicates the cat's personality and inner life. Evaluates facial expressiveness, body posture and tension, and specificity of moment to surface portraits over snapshots.

input_schema.description: A collection of cat pictures to rank by the expressive character of the cat in each image.

items.description: A cat picture to evaluate for expressive character.
